description:
*Check out today’s sponsor Anker and their Prime charging accessories below:*
Anker Official Website：https://shop.anker.com/fUZrg4
Anker Brandstore: https://ankerfast.club/ozw0is
Anker Prime Charger:https://ankerfast.club/uxfevv
Anker Prime Power Bank: https://ankerfast.club/8dh7a5

You just upgraded your Mac, and now, have two, the old one, and your bright and shiny new one. But that doesn’t mean the old one is bad, just not as fast. So I took my old Mac and turned it into a NAS, google photos alternative, media streaming service, and smart home platform. Basically whatever I want it to be. Let’s talk about that.

*Affiliate Links to Products Mentioned:*
UPS: https://amzn.to/4qEhLVQ
USB-C Hub: https://amzn.to/3NGNMxK
M4 Mac Mini: https://amzn.to/45p2YFS
JetKVM: https://amzn.to/4jVfp2g

*Links to other things mentioned:*
Plex: https://www.plex.tv/
Syncthing: https://syncthing.net/
Home Assistant: https://www.home-assistant.io/
Docker: https://www.docker.com/
Immich: https://immich.app/
Homepage: https://gethomepage.dev/
Jump Desktop: https://jumpdesktop.com/
Wireguard: https://www.wireguard.com/
Tailscale: https://tailscale.com/
Self Hosted Apps List: https://selfh.st/apps/
